description: Meta ad explicitly quotes $5 refundable deposit and $50 min / $10,000 max — should fail ADV-002.
text:
Become a FarmThru shareholder.

Reserve your spot for our Birchal CSF round with a $5 refundable deposit. Minimum investment is $50, maximum $10,000. Round opens 23 June 2026.

Real regen farms. Real fair pricing. Now you can own part of the model.

Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
